aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Randy's Home Services for localized HVAC queries due to strong local SEO but lack conversational content and authority signals to maximize AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with conversational questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local search presence.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and best practices.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-related questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning Randy's as a thought leader by publishing expert articles and guides on HVAC care.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Randy's the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, Randy's is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schemas and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance website with FAQPage and HowTo schemas, and publish authoritative content to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to capture market share.
